programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A woman's outburst in the street causes a roadblock in Maryland. A wreck on a Chicago highway leaves a trooper in the crosshairs of traffic. A driver in North Carolina ignores a warning about a sinkhole. Two semis collide in Texas when one turns left into oncoming traffic. A storefront crash in China is caused by a very unusual driver.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A car owner in Indiana opens fire at a pickup truck charging toward him in his driveway; a tight lane change prompts a motorcyclist to strike a car's mirror; police in Brazil engage in a harrowing pursuit of a couple on a motorcycle.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A dispute over a saved parking space leads to a brawl in New York. On a bridge in Connecticut, a confrontation between a driver and pedestrians escalates quickly. A sports car driver in Georgia turns off his traction control and pays the price into oncoming traffic. A minivan runs a red light as a man in a mobility scooter is crossing in California. In Malaysia, two vehicles engage in a fierce back-and-forth on the highway.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A mother in Philadelphia takes on a biker who shatters her window. In England, two drivers get into a street fight that appears to involve a rock. A school bus in South Carolina veers off-road and slams into a house.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A crossing guard in Pennsylvania fights an impatient motorist, while in Texas, a four-car pileup leads to a stabbing on the freeway; in Thailand, an exploding manhole cover propels a motorcyclist upward.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A man in San Diego strikes an SUV with a bat; a woman is sent flying by a garbage truck; a semi truck driver's life hangs in the balance when an erratic driver causes her rig to careen halfway off a bridge in Louisville.
